title: MrBlob37's Life Crystals
description: Mod which adds ability to gain more health
body:
Get ability to gain more hearts using this mod!

**Warning! Version 2.0 is NOT compatible with any lower versions! Trying to run 2.0 version of the mod on world that had any lower version on it before might corrupt the world!**

MrBlob37's life crystals mod adds different health crystals to minecraft! Currently there are over twelve health crystals in this mod, each giving player additional hearts, except for health breaker, which resets your hearts. This is my first minecraft mod, so I am open to hear all suggestions.

It is recomended to play this mod with [Overflowing bars by Fuzs](https://modrinth.com/mod/overflowing-bars).

Also check out [my other projects](https://modrinth.com/user/MrBlob37)
